description: [DSRs: crates/rlm-derive/src/rlm_type.rs + lib.rs] Wire up the main derive entry point. Update lib.rs to use modules. Create rlm_type.rs with derive() fn that calls pyclass::generate_pymethods_with_repr + describe::generate_describe. Verify #[pyclass] presence.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 1.9): wire main derive entry point in `crates/rlm-derive/src/rlm_type.rs`.
- Parse `RlmTypeAttrs` via darling.
- Emit pyclass impl (`generate_pyclass`) + `RlmDescribe` impl (`generate_describe`).
- Update `generators/mod.rs` to export only needed modules.

title: Task 1.9: Wire up the main derive entry point

closed_reason: pyclass.rs complete with getters, __baml__, tests. Other generators (iter/properties/schema) are separate tasks.
description: Create generators/mod.rs and generators/pyclass.rs. Generate #[pymethods] impl with field getters (handling Copy vs Clone vs &str), __baml__() method using BamlType/ToBamlValue → BamlValue → baml_bridge::py::baml_value_to_py. Wire repr, iter, properties, and schema generators.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Task 1.3): add `crates/rlm-derive/src/generators/*` with PyO3 codegen.
- `generators/mod.rs` exports `pyclass`, `repr`, `iter`, `properties`, `describe`, `schema`.
- `generators/pyclass.rs` emits `#[pymethods]` with getters, __baml__ (via `baml_bridge::ToBamlValue` + `baml_bridge::py::baml_value_to_py`), and wires repr/iter/properties/schema generators.
Getter logic: return Copy by value, String as &str, otherwise clone; skip fields with `skip_python`.

title: Task 1.3: Implement PyO3 code generation
